items.name: badge
items.title: BTBadge
items.description: Status label pill. Displays variant-colored pill with optional left/right icon slots.

items.name: button
items.title: BTButton
items.description: Interactive action button with 5 variants and 2 sizes. Supports left/right icon slots and icon-only mode.

items.name: button-link
items.title: BTButtonLink
items.description: Inline hyperlink-style action atom. Text label with optional icon slots. Hover → underline + bold. Active → dims to neutral. Disabled → text.disabled.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: BTCheckbox
items.description: Checkbox atom with 7 states: uncheck, check, indeterminate, disable-uncheck, disable-check, disable-indeterminate, and error. Supports optional label and subtext. Fully accessible via native input with transparent overlay pattern.

items.name: hint
items.title: BTHint
items.description: Notification indicator atom. Renders as a solid red dot (no count) or a red pill/circle containing a count value. Numbers > 99 are displayed as "99+". Three sizes: lg (dot 16px / badge 24px), md (dot 10px / badge 16px), sm (dot 8px / badge 16px with smaller font).

items.name: radio-button
items.title: BTRadioButton
items.description: Radio button atom with 5 states: default, active, disable, disable-active, and error. Supports optional label and subtext. Uses native <input type="radio"> with transparent overlay for full accessibility. Use multiple BTRadioButton with the same v-model to build a radio group.

items.name: separator
items.title: BTSeparator
items.description: A 1px visual divider line. Renders horizontal (full-width) or vertical (full-height) using the border.primary token.

items.name: slider
items.title: BTSlider
items.description: Interactive range slider atom. Supports three layout types (default, range, vertical) and three color variants (primary, secondary, destructive). Single-thumb and dual-thumb (range) modes supported.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: BTTooltip
items.description: Hover / focus tooltip wrapping a trigger element. Renders a dark-background balloon via Teleport/portal with a rounded-tip arrow caret. Supports plain text or rich content slot.

items.name: alert
items.title: BTAlert
items.description: Contextual feedback banner with icon, label, optional description, optional action button/link, and optional dismiss button.

items.name: avatar
items.title: BTAvatar
items.description: Circular badge displaying a user's profile image or auto-derived initials. Supports skeleton loading state. Used standalone or inside BTAvatarGroup (organism) for stacked group displays.

items.name: tabs
items.title: BTTabs
items.description: Tab strip molecule with two variants: 'segmented' (pill tray with primary fill on active) and 'line' (flat row with primary underline on active). Controlled via v-model:activeIndex. Supports optional leading/trailing icon slots per tab index.

items.name: tooltip-step
items.title: BTTooltipStep
items.description: Coachmark / onboarding step balloon with navigation buttons. Standalone and presentational — positioning is the caller's responsibility.

items.name: avatar-group
items.title: BTAvatarGroup
items.description: Stacked group of BTAvatar instances with horizontal negative-margin overlap. Renders a "+N" overflow counter when items exceed `max`. Stacking offsets match Figma 504:705 specs (8/10/12/16/20/32 px per size).

items.name: modal
items.title: BTModal
items.description: Centred modal dialog with header (title + optional subtext + optional close button), optional content slot, and optional footer with checkbox plus secondary/primary action buttons. Backdrop click dismisses when `dismissable` is true. Three width presets: sm (500px), md (720px), lg (1042px).
